name: Cranberry-Lemon Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking powder and salt in a bowl. Cut in the chilled butter until crumbly. Stir in the dried cranberries and lemon peel.
2. Pour in the buttermilk and stir with a fork until the mixture holds together. Gather the dough into a ball and gently knead a few times on a floured surface. Pat out dough to an 8-inch circle and cut into 8 wedges. Place 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet and brush the tops with the milk. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon sugar.
3. Bake in a preheated 425-degree oven for 15-20 minutes, until golden. Serve warm.
